# Strava Segment Attestations

Strava Segment Attestations is a web application for creating verifiable onchain attestations for completed Strava segments on Linea using the Verax protocol.

## Canonical Pages

- [Home](https://strava.alainnicolas.fr/): Connect Strava, select a completed segment, and create an onchain attestation.
- [About](https://strava.alainnicolas.fr/about): Product overview, workflow, attestation use cases, and technology stack.

## Related Resources

- [Source code](https://github.com/alainncls/strava-segments-to-attestations)
- [Verax protocol](https://ver.ax)
- [Linea](https://linea.build)
- [Strava](https://www.strava.com)
